users.title: User Profile
users.description: Information about a user's account, including their name, role, and contact details.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

name.description: The full name of the user.

role.description: The user's role, determining their level of access.

status.description: The current status of the user's account.

is_commissionable.description: Whether the user is eligible for commissions.

pix_key.description: The user's PIX key for commission payments.

contract_accepted.description: Whether the user has accepted the platform contract.

sidebar.description: Explicit overrides for sidebar menu items.

dashboard_cards.description: Explicit overrides for dashboard widget visibility.

indications.title: Indication
indications.description: A sales lead or product indication submitted by a partner.

external_seller_uid.description: ID of the partner who created the indication.

internal_seller_uid.description: ID of the internal seller assigned to the lead.

base_commission_value.description: The value upon which commission is calculated.

stock_items.title: Stock Item
stock_items.description: An item currently available in the factory or Sinop warehouse.

commissions.title: Commission
commissions.description: Records of commissions earned by partners.

customer_evaluations.title: Customer Satisfaction Survey
customer_evaluations.description: Records of evaluations and scores provided by customers on Roder machines and sales processes.

credit_cleared_documents.title: Credit Cleared Documents
credit_cleared_documents.description: Records of CPFs/CNPJs that have had their financial debts/restrictions marked as cleared by financial managers.

document.description: The cleaned document number (CPF or CNPJ).

cleared.description: Whether the restrictions are considered cleared.

cleared_at.description: Timestamp of when the clearance was issued.

customers.title: Customer
customers.description: Information about a registered customer, either created manually or automatically when loading budget XML files.

endomarketing_actions.title: Endomarketing Action
endomarketing_actions.description: Records of internal marketing and HR actions for team engagement.

endomarketing_financial_items.title: Financial Cost Item
endomarketing_financial_items.description: Individual cost records for a specific endomarketing action.

endomarketing_evidence.title: Action Evidence
endomarketing_evidence.description: Files, photos, and videos documenting an endomarketing action.

financial_dashboard_months.title: Financial Dashboard Month
financial_dashboard_months.description: Monthly compiled financial KPIs and uploaded files status for Matriz, Filial Sinop, and Consolidado.

equipment_dossiers.title: Equipment Dossier
equipment_dossiers.description: Rich technical dossier containing structured reports, compatibilities, choice reasons, audios, and uploaded files for a specific machine model.

dossier_text.description: The main technical dossier or report text.

compatibility_notes.description: Organized compatibility notes with machine bases.

choice_reason.description: The reason for selecting this choice and model details.

productivity_info.description: Data and statistics on machine productivity.

audios.description: Recorded oral dossiers or audio notes.

/equipment_dossiers/{dossierId}.description: Rich technical dossiers containing structured reports, compatibilities, audios, and PDF manuals for specific machine models.

/endomarketing_actions/{actionId}.description: Primary records for all endomarketing initiatives.

/users/{userId}.description: Store for user profile and permission data.

/indications/{indicationId}.description: Store for sales leads and tracking.

/stock_imports_fae/{itemId}.description: FAE imported equipment and tracking details.

/edge_nodes/{nodeId}.description: Real-time online status and heartbeats of active devices.

/customer_evaluations/{evaluationId}.description: Customer satisfaction surveys and evaluation scheduling records.

/credit_cleared_documents/{docId}.description: Store of cleared/regularized CPFs and CNPJs.

/customers/{customerId}.description: Store for customer profiles and details.

/financial_dashboard_months/{monthId}.description: Monthly compiled financial KPIs and uploaded files status for Matriz, Filial Sinop, and Consolidado.

/monthly_statements/{statementId}.description: Store for monthly consolidated statements/reports for partners/sellers commissions.
